message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-k4pod (lnc + msg wording)

Fixed in commit d6d78b6.  local_node_connectivity is no longer
unconditionally broken — it now delegates to nx's max-flow-based
implementation (in networkx.algorithms.connectivity).
single_source_dijkstra / single_source_bellman_ford /
multi_source_dijkstra now match nx's exact missing-source error
wording (was emitting a quoted-repr 'Source \\'99\\' is not in G'
variant from the Rust binding).

Sweep: 7101 passed, 0 failed (+10 new regression tests).

Found via self-review per the idle-nudge discipline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
